name: the food
identity: A crucial resource brought by the player's group, accepted by Chief Thorne's tribe as part of a negotiated agreement. Serves as sustenance for the starving people and a symbol of the players' contribution to the tribe's survival.
current_status: Accepted by Chief Thorne. Two of his younger trackers will remain to learn the paths and planting methods from the provided provisions.

description.value: Provisions brought by the player's group, consisting of food supplies for the tribe.

role.value: Sustenance for the starving tribe and a key component in the negotiated agreement with Chief Thorne.

volatile_state.location: With Chief Thorne's tribe, at the council fire
volatile_state.current_activity: Being accepted by Chief Thorne; two trackers will remain to learn from the provisions
